rule_text: Any artifact that uses a Switching coordinate or Switching-derived table (including X_eff_nonunique, X_eff, Switching observables, or Switching-matched rows) is CROSS_MODULE_SWITCHING_RELAXATION even if path is under reports/relaxation or tables/relaxation.
Do not label such analyses Relaxation-only based on folder alone.
Do not use X_canon for AX claims unless an explicit Switching contract allows it; prefer X_eff_nonunique or documented effective coordinate name.
Treat get_canonical_X / canonical_X as legacy/misleading until a dedicated audit; do not equate with current X_eff_nonunique without proof.
Keep A_obs, A_proj_nonSVD, m0_svd / SVD_score_mode1, and legacy A_T symbols distinct; never collapse to bare A without qualifier.
Power-law exponent near 0.66 is diagnostic unless cross-validated model comparison supports stronger wording.
Main narrative must distinguish bridge-style linkage vs universal power-law exponent claims.
Future outputs may use a dedicated cross_module namespace after compatibility review; default is index-first, no moves.
